versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   n8n-1-0-15                      true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: n8n
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: n8n-1-0-15
      name: n8n
      namespace: n8n
      values: |-
        n8n:
          main:
            config:
              n8n:
                hide_usage_page: true
            secret:
              n8n:
                encryption_key: "<your-secure-encryption-key>"
            resources:
              limits:
                memory: 2048Mi
              requests:
                memory: 512Mi
            service:
              type: NodePort
              port: 5678
